name: Encapsulated Rapamycin Chow Preparation
preprompt: Draft the formulation protocol for encapsulated rapamycin chow at 14 ppm and the matched eudragit-only control chow. Include ingredient sourcing, mixing/encapsulation steps, batch labeling, storage conditions, stability considerations, and quality-control checks for dose consistency.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Defines how to prepare and verify the treatment and control diets.
